[9] Caroline informed Melanie on August 23, 2023, that she applied to adoption agencies, a decision she made with help from an adoption advice/assistance group. She also shared that she has a guinea pig named Oscar. Melanie congratulated Caroline and shared that she has a dog named Oliver and a new cat named Bailey. They discussed their pets, with Caroline sharing a photo of Oscar eating parsley and Melanie sharing a photo of Oliver and recounting a funny story about him. Melanie also shared a photo of a horse painting she recently did, which led to a discussion about their shared love for horses and art. Caroline then shared a self-portrait she painted, explaining that painting helps her explore her identity and feel liberated. The conversation concluded with Caroline expressing her commitment to living authentically and promoting LGBTQ rights, and Melanie wishing her well on her adoption journey.  (tags: adoption, pets, guinea_pig, dog, cat, horses, painting, art, self-portrait, identity, lgbtq, authenticity)
[10] Caroline contacted her mentor for adoption advice, expressing her readiness to be a mother. Melanie shared that a friend adopted last year and found the process long but rewarding, prompting Melanie to consider adoption herself. Caroline provided tips for starting the adoption process, including researching agencies, gathering documents, and preparing emotionally. Melanie mentioned a recent setback where she got hurt and had to take a break from pottery, her creative outlet. Both Caroline and Melanie shared their recent artwork, with Melanie showing a sunset painting and an abstract piece, and Caroline sharing a drawing inspired by a transgender poetry reading she attended.  (tags: adoption, art, painting, pottery, poetry, self-expression, emotional-support, personal-growth, conversation, transgender)
[11] Melanie and Caroline discussed their recent activities. Melanie had a quiet weekend after camping with her family two weekends prior. Caroline joined an LGBTQ youth mentorship program and found it rewarding, specifically mentioning mentoring a transgender teen and attending an LGBT pride event where her mentee's face lit up. Caroline also shared that she will be having an LGBTQ art show next month and shared two paintings: one with a blue and yellow design and another of a tree with a bright sun, which she painted after visiting an LGBTQ center to capture unity and strength. Melanie praised Caroline's painting and mentioned her kids and she finished another painting.  (tags: lgbtq, mentorship, art, painting, pride, community, youth, family, camping, conversation)
[12] Caroline and Melanie discussed Caroline's experience at an LGBTQ conference two days prior to July 12, 2023, where she felt accepted and connected with others. Caroline expressed her desire to pursue a career in counseling and mental health, inspired by her own past struggles and the support she received. Melanie shared a book image that reminded her to pursue dreams and later shared images of her pets, Luna (dog) and Oliver (cat), and new pink running shoes. Melanie mentioned she has been running longer to destress and improve her mental health.  (tags: LGBTQ, conference, trans_rights, mental_health, counseling, books, pets, running, self_acceptance, community, support_system, career)
[13] Caroline and Melanie reconnected, discussing sentimental items and recent life events. Caroline shared that a cross and heart necklace from her Swedish grandma, given when she was young, symbolizes love, faith, and strength. She also mentioned a hand-painted bowl, a gift from a friend for her 18th birthday, representing art and self-expression. Melanie shared about a recent family camping trip in the mountains, where they explored nature, roasted marshmallows, hiked, and enjoyed family time. Caroline then revealed her new career interest in counseling and mental health, specifically focusing on supporting trans people, inspired by her own journey and an LGBTQ+ counseling workshop she attended last Friday.  (tags: personal, conversation, career, mental_health, family, sentimental_items, LGBTQ+, counseling, Sweden, camping)
[14] Caroline and Melanie reconnected on July 6, 2023, discussing recent life updates. Caroline shared her interest in counseling/mental health work and her progress in building a library for future children, including classics, diverse stories, and educational books. Melanie recounted a museum trip with her kids, where they enjoyed a dinosaur exhibit, and shared her childhood love for "Charlotte's Web." Caroline also highlighted the crucial support from her friends and family during her transition, which included a recent picnic. Melanie reciprocated by sharing a photo of her family camping at the beach, emphasizing the importance of family bonding.  (tags: conversation, personal_updates, family, mental_health, books, childhood, support_system, transition, parenting, friendship)
[15] SUMMARY:
Caroline and Melanie caught up on their busy weeks. Melanie shared about taking her kids to a pottery workshop last Friday, where they made clay sculptures, and their recent nature-inspired painting. Caroline shared about attending a council meeting for adoption last Friday, which strengthened her resolve to adopt. They discussed the meaning of flowers, with Melanie sharing that they were an important part of her wedding decor. Caroline then shared about her experience at a pride parade a few weeks ago, where she felt accepted and proud, and how it inspired her to transition. Melanie shared that creativity and family help her find peace, and that her family was supportive during her move and they enjoy hiking and exploring forests together.
